sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time_data (id INTEGER, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO test_time_data (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIME '11:30:00');
INSERT INTO test_time_data (id, event_time) VALUES (2, TIME '15:45:30.123456');
UPDATE test_time_data SET event_time = TIME '08:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_time_data WHERE event_time > TIME '12:00:00';
